spokenClause: You open Claude Code in your project for the hundredth time. You explain your folder structure again.
explanationGoal: Show the developer repeating context setup, establishing the pain of memory loss
informationDelta: Claude Code forgets project context between sessions
primaryAttentionTarget: Developer typing the same explanation again
viewerStateBefore: Does not realize this is a solvable problem
viewerStateAfter: Recognizes the frustration of repeated context setup
designRationale: Visual metaphor of repeated typing makes abstract memory loss concrete and relatable
explanationContribution: Shows the specific action of re-explaining, which voiceover alone cannot convey
comprehensionContribution: Reduces abstraction: memory loss becomes visible as repeated typing
spokenResponsibility: Describes the general problem of memory loss
visualResponsibility: Shows the specific repeated action that triggers frustration
onScreenTextPurpose: Highlights the key repeated phrase to anchor recognition
initialState: Developer opens Claude Code with empty context
finalState: Explanation complete, Claude Code still does not remember
carryOut: Established: Claude Code forgets, developer must repeat
evidenceBoundary: Must show real repeated actions, not dramatized exaggeration
lockedMeaning: Claude Code requires repeated context setup due to session memory loss
flexibleImplementation: Visual style of the typing animation, exact phrasing shown
forbiddenDowngrade: Cannot reduce to a static text card saying memory loss

enterMotion.purpose: Gentle entry to match frustration tone

acceptanceCriteria: Viewer recognizes the repeated setup action
requiredRenderEvidence: First frame: empty Claude Code terminal
Last frame: explanation complete, still empty context
